data.name: 與女大生的同居生活
data.detailed_description:
◆特色系統

　◇在環境設定裡能打開全CG模式,自由瀏覽HCG

　◇無壓力操作設計-快速的文字跳轉系統

◆故事

身為一名工程師，除了還不錯的薪水之外，根本一點自己的生活也沒有，更不要說是女朋友了。
在陰雨綿綿的憂鬱冬季裡，一名叫作「小雪」的女大學生出現在了我的生活中。

小雪清純可愛，溫柔中又帶著小惡魔般壞壞的性格。她擁有陽光般燦爛的笑容，卻總在某個瞬間流露出哀傷的神情。
小雪不但主動要求要和我在冬天結束之前同居，還在相遇的第一天就要求和我無套H，自稱是第一次要我溫柔點的她，卻說她有在吃避孕藥……？



隨著同居相處和一起出遊的過程，我慢慢地去了解小雪的一切、和她變得親近，卻還是能感受到她有許多不願意告訴我的事情。
她能夠接受我和她做各種色色的事情，卻絕口不提對我是什麼感情。
而我呢？我對小雪又是什麼感情？

在冬天結束時，我們之間的關係究竟會像是融化的雪一般消逝，又或者我能試著去改變什麼……？

◆玩法

在與小雪同居的日子裡，上班日的早上可以選擇【看電視】、【和小雪聊天】、【提早出門】（金錢增加），晚上可以選擇和小雪【聊天】、【H】，並可以利用【網購】功能購買各種服裝和道具，除了能讓小雪【換裝】之外，也能開啟各式各樣的play，和小雪度過性福的每一天。
週日則有和小雪出遊的劇情，每一次對話的選擇都可能會影響和小雪最終的結局。

◆遊戲特色

◇25張基本CG，5組動態CG，包含差分300張以上
◇遊戲文字12萬字
◇一位女主角
◇戀愛養成系遊戲
◇遊戲結局：2種

data.short_description: 原先只想打發時間的我在包養網上約了位叫小雪的女孩子見面，結果本人竟然是清純可愛的大學生，還向我提出了同居要求！更驚人的是，帶回家的第一天她就要求和我無套H？！眼前的小雪背後究竟藏著什麼故事呢……？

繁體中文, 英文, 簡體中文, 德文, 俄文, 日文*, 泰文, 越南文, 韓文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

data.name: Life With a College Girl
data.detailed_description:
◆Story

As an engineer, apart from a decent salary, I didn't have any personal life at all, let alone a girlfriend.
During the rainy and melancholic winter, a female college girl called "Snow" appeared in my life.

Snow was innocent and lovely – gentle but with a little devilish character. She had a smile like the sunshine, but she looked sad at some points.
Not only did Snow ask to live with me before the end of winter, she also asked to have unprotected sex with me on the first day we met. Claiming it was her first time and asking me to be gentle, she said she was on the pill...?



As we lived together and went on trips together, I slowly got to know Snow and became closer to her, but I could still feel that there were many things she did not want to tell me.
She was fine with me doing all sorts of erotic things with her, but never said anything about her feelings for me.
And what about me? What were my feelings for Snow?

When winter passed, would our relationship fade like melting snow, or could I try to make a change…?

◆Gameplay Instructions

During the days when you live with Snow, you can choose to “Watch TV,” “Chat with Snow,” or “Go out early in the morning” (increase money) on the mornings of workdays. In the evening, you can choose to “Chat” with Snow or to “Have sex.” You can also “Shop online” to buy various clothes and items, which not only allows Snow to "Dress up" but also allows you to start various roleplay scenarios and enjoy your happy days with Snow.
On Sundays, you can go on trips with Snow. Every choice you make will have an impact on the final outcome of your relationship with her.

◆Game features

◇25 basic CGs, including more than 300 differentials and 5 motion CGs
◇Game text: 120,000
◇One main female character
◇Romantic simulation game
◇Game endings: 2 types

data.short_description: I became acquainted with a girl called Snow on a sugar daddy site. I asked to meet her out of boredom, but she turned out to be a cute college girl who asked me to bring her home! What was more, the first day I brought her home, she asked to have sex with me without a condom?! What was the story behind this Snow...?
data.supported_languages:
Traditional Chinese, English, Simplified Chinese, German, Russian, Japanese*, Thai, Vietnamese, Korean
*languages with full audio support
